feature.description: Full feature development cycle: compose brief → implement → review

implement.description: Implement from an existing brief — skip the composer step

quality-implement.description: Implement with quality gate — coder iterates until analyzer approves

auto-route.description: Auto-route: composer classifies the request and dispatches to the right workflow

smart-dev.description: Dynamic development — orchestrator chooses the right agents at runtime
smart-dev.satisfactionCriteria: The implementation is complete and correct, and the analyzer has confirmed no issues.
